Mrs. Brittany

Owner · The Busy Bee Daycare

Meet Your Caregiver

Hi, I'm Brittany — but the kids call me Mrs. B 👋

Hi, I'm Brittany, owner of The Busy Bee Daycare. Creating a warm, safe, and inspiring environment for children has always been my passion. Every child deserves to feel loved, encouraged, and celebrated while learning through play. My goal is to provide a true home-away-from-home where children build confidence, curiosity, and lifelong friendships.

With over 16 years of experience caring for children and families, I believe the little moments matter most — the morning hugs, the messy art projects, the first words in sign language, and the excitement of discovering something new every day.

Childhood should feel magical. We believe it isn't meant to be rushed — it should be filled with muddy boots, painted hands, storybooks, laughter, friendships, and the confidence that comes from feeling deeply loved.

  • 16+ years of childcare experience
  • State licensed home daycare
  • CPR & First Aid certified
  • Background checked & insured
Learn · Explore · Grow · Bloom

A program for every stage

From newborn nursery through kindergarten readiness, every Busy Bee has a place built just for them.

3–16 Months

Busy Bee Nursery

  • Individualized feeding & nap schedules
  • Tummy time & sensory play
  • Daily sign language basics
  • One-on-one bonding
  • Gentle daily routines
  • Detailed daily reports for parents
16–30 Months

Busy Bee Explorers

  • Daily sign language & beginner ASL
  • Sensory exploration
  • Language development
  • Gross motor skills
  • Music & movement
  • Practical life skills
2–4 Years

Busy Bee Learners

  • Early literacy
  • Number sense
  • Social skills
  • STEM discovery
  • Creative arts
  • Independence
4–5 Years

Busy Bee Scholars

  • Kindergarten prep
  • Phonics & early reading
  • Writing
  • Math readiness
  • Leadership
  • Problem solving
Our Daily Rhythm

A balanced day of learning, play & growth

8:00 – 8:15 AM

Breakfast Together

We start our day with a healthy breakfast, good conversation, and gratitude.

8:15 – 8:45 AM

Arrival & Morning Invitations

Children are welcomed with warm greetings, free play, sensory activities, books, and engaging learning invitations.

8:45 – 9:15 AM

Morning Meeting

We gather for songs, calendar, weather, ASL signs, and our daily focus.

9:15 – 10:00 AM

Literacy Workshop

Stories, letters, phonics, writing, and language development through hands-on exploration.

10:00 – 10:45 AM

Discovery Lab

STEM experiments, nature studies, sensory play, and problem-solving fun.

10:45 – 11:15 AM

Snack & Conversation

Healthy snack time and meaningful conversation together.

11:15 AM – 12:00 PM

Outdoor Exploration

Fresh air, gross motor play, nature walks, gardening, and outdoor discovery.

12:00 – 12:30 PM

Creative Studio

Art, music, movement, and imaginative creative expression.

12:30 – 1:00 PM

Lunch

A nourishing lunch together, followed by helping clean up and set the table.

1:00 – 3:00 PM

Rest & Quiet Time

Rest, nap, or quiet activities to recharge our bodies and minds.

3:00 – 3:30 PM

Afternoon Discovery

Small group learning, fine motor activities, puzzles, and engaging centers.

3:30 – 4:00 PM

Music & Movement

Songs, dances, instruments, and movement to build joy and confidence.

4:00 – 4:45 PM

Open Play — Indoor or Outdoor

Children choose play experiences they love as they prepare for pickup.

4:45 – 5:00 PM

Goodbyes & Sweet Endings

We close out the day with pickup, hugs, and happy hearts!

What Makes Us Different

Signature experiences that inspire

Beyond the daily rhythm, these are the special touches woven into every week at Busy Bee.

🤟

Daily Baby Sign & ASL

Signs are woven into songs, stories, transitions & play to build communication and confidence.

🌿

Nature-Based Learning

Gardening, bug exploration, nature journals, bird watching, and outdoor classrooms.

🔬

Little Scientists

Hands-on experiments and STEM exploration that spark curiosity every week.

💛

Kindness Project

Each month we complete a kindness project that helps children grow compassionate hearts.

🍳

Cooking Studio

Child-friendly recipes that build healthy habits, math skills & fine motor development.

🎨

Little Artists

Process-focused art that encourages creativity, self-expression & confidence.

2026–2027 Curriculum

A nurturing hive of learning, growth & fun

Every month brings a new theme woven into letters, numbers, shapes, and sight words.

Aug Welcome to Our Hive!
Sep All About Me & Family
Oct Autumn Wonders
Nov Grateful Hearts
Dec Winter Wonders
Jan Amazing Animals
Feb Healthy Me & Friends
Mar Spring in Bloom
Apr Nature's Little Helpers
May Queen Explorers
Jun Summer Adventures
Jul Stars, Stripes & Sunshine
